Section Title: SBI Comma Fund > About this fund > About SBI Comma Fund
Content:
SBI Comma Fund returns of last 1-year are 11.69%. Since launch, it has delivered 12.13% average annual returns. The fund has doubled the money invested in it every 6 yrs.
SBI Comma Fund scheme's ability to deliver returns consistently is higher than most funds of its category. Its ability to control losses in a falling market is average.
The fund has the majority of its money invested in Energy, Metals & Mining, Materials, Chemicals, Consumer Staples sectors. It has taken less exposure in Energy, Metals & Mining sectors compared to other funds in the category.
The fund's top 5 holdings are in Tata Steel Ltd., Oil And Natural Gas Corporation Ltd., Reliance Industries Ltd., Vedanta Ltd., Ultratech Cement Ltd..
...
 ...

What is the current price / NAV of SBI Comma Fund?The current [NAV](https://www.smallcase.com/learn/nav-net-asset-value/?utm_source=tickertape&utm_medium=faq&utm_campaign=asset-pages) of SBI Comma Fund is ₹122.25, as of 10th April 2026. What are the returns of SBI Comma Fund?The SBI Comma Fund was launched on 4th January 2013. This mutual fund's past returns are as follows:
1 Year Returns: 26.03%
3 Year Returns: 21.43%
5 Year Returns: 15.10%
